title: Goodbye at the Airport
synopsis: A family trip to the airport becomes a lesson in saying goodbye with hope.
sentences: Mina's uncle was leaving for another country on Sunday afternoon.
The whole family drove with him to the airport.
Inside, the building felt bright, busy, and full of rolling suitcases.
Mina looked up at the departure board with lines of place names and times.
Her uncle checked in his bag and showed her his ticket.
They had a small meal together before it was time to say goodbye.
Mina tried to smile, even though she felt a little sad.
Her uncle promised to send pictures and call when he arrived.
At the security gate, he turned and waved one last time.
Mina waved back as high as she could.
On the drive home, she held the postcard he had given her.
Goodbyes were hard, she thought, but they also meant that someone had been worth missing.
